title: John Smith Papers
content_description: Collection contains correspondence, photographs, manuscripts, and a small number of floppy disks. Some oversized maps and architectural drawings are included.
condition_description: Generally good condition. Some fragile newspaper clippings. Photographs show signs of curling.
inventory: Box 1: Correspondence (1950-1970). Box 2: Photographs and negatives. Box 3: Manuscripts and drafts. Box 4: Miscellaneous including 3.5 inch floppy disks.
access_restrictions_note: Some materials are restricted. Personnel records are closed for 30 years from date of creation.

collection_management.processing_plan: Arrange and describe at the folder level.
